description: Measures Psychological Capital across 4 dimensions: Hope, Efficacy, Resilience, Optimism

questions.text: I can think of many ways to get out of a tough situation.

example_answer.label: Strongly Agree
example_answer.explanation: I always find alternative routes when I hit a dead end.

questions.text: Right now, I am energetically pursuing my goals.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Agree
example_answer.explanation: I am actively working toward what I want but sometimes lose momentum.

questions.text: There are lots of ways around any problem I face.

example_answer.label: Agree
example_answer.explanation: I rarely feel stuck because I can usually see multiple options.

questions.text: I feel confident helping to set targets and goals in my work or daily life.

example_answer.label: Agree
example_answer.explanation: I am comfortable defining what I want to achieve and how to get there.

questions.text: I feel confident presenting information to a group of people.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Disagree
example_answer.explanation: Public situations make me unsure of myself and I often stumble.

questions.text: I feel confident contributing to discussions about strategy or direction.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Agree
example_answer.explanation: I share my views in group settings, though I sometimes second-guess myself.

questions.text: When things are uncertain, I usually expect the best.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Agree
example_answer.explanation: I lean toward hoping things work out even when the outcome is unclear.

questions.text: I can get through difficult times because I have experienced difficulty before.

example_answer.label: Strongly Agree
example_answer.explanation: Past hardships have made me more confident in my ability to recover.

questions.text: I feel like I can handle many things at a time when they come my way.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Disagree
example_answer.explanation: I tend to feel overwhelmed when multiple challenges hit at the same time.

questions.text: I always look on the bright side of things regarding my work and life.

example_answer.label: Agree
example_answer.explanation: Even in bad situations I try to find something positive to hold onto.

questions.text: I am optimistic about what will happen to me in the future.

example_answer.label: Somewhat Agree
example_answer.explanation: I generally believe things will turn out well for me over time.

questions.text: In this area of my life, things never work out the way I want them to.

example_answer.label: Disagree
example_answer.explanation: Things usually do work out for me, so I disagree with this negative statement. Reverse scored: 7 - 2 = 5.
